sourceMovie.title: My Spy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: My Spy works as a family movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The family and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Get Smart
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Spy clicked for you, Get Smart (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after My Spy?
faq.answer: Try Get Smart, The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run, Johnny English Strikes Again—each shares DNA with My Spy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is My Spy?
faq.answer: My Spy (2020) is best described as Family, Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is My Spy part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "My Spy Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
